title: Add rate limiting to the URL-shortener API
intent: Add rate limiting to the URL-shortener API so a single client can't exhaust the service.
acceptance: Past the configured threshold the deployed API returns 429 with a numeric Retry-After header; under the threshold it returns 200. This is the harness-authored real-results E2E contract.
status: LOOP 1 COMPLETE — all 10 criteria validated live (see files/validation-log.md L1–L12)
